Use this data source to query ports attached to a specific ECS router.

Example Usage

```hcl
data "edgenext_ecs_router_ports" "example" {
  router_id = data.edgenext_ecs_routers.example.routers[0].id
}

data "edgenext_ecs_routers" "example" {
  router_name = "default-router"
  limit       = 1
}
```

Argument Reference

* `router_id` - (Required) Router ID.

Attributes Reference

* `id` - Stable query ID generated by provider.
* `total` - Matched router port count.
* `ports` - Router port list. Common fields include `id`, `name`, `ip_address`, `mac_address`, `network_name`, `status`, and `created_at`.
